## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New data rows added
- [ ] Existing data updated or corrected
- [ ] Broken link fixed
- [ ] Script or workflow update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Data checklist (if adding/updating data)
- [ ] New rows added to the correct CSV file in `data/`
- [ ] All IDs are unique and follow the naming convention (e.g. CR-009, FW-008)
- [ ] All links point to official government or board sources
- [ ] Status is one of: `Active`, `Archived`, `Superseded`, `Pending Review`
- [ ] Tags are lowercase and comma-separated
- [ ] `docs/update_log.md` has been updated with this change
